name: CloudSync Pro
supportNotes: Supports SSO via SAML and OAuth 2.0. Data residency options: US, EU, APAC. SLA: 99.9% uptime.

name: SecureVault Enterprise
supportNotes: Requires annual security audit. Includes 24/7 priority support. HIPAA and SOC 2 compliant.

name: TeamFlow Basic
supportNotes: Best for small teams. Includes chat, file sharing, and basic task management. No SSO on Basic tier.

name: AnalyticsHub
supportNotes: Connects to SQL, Snowflake, and BigQuery. Custom report builder included. Training session available on onboarding.

name: DevPipeline CI
supportNotes: Parallel builds up to 4 concurrent runners. Docker and Kubernetes deployment support. Free tier: 500 build minutes/month.

name: NotifyPulse
supportNotes: Includes delivery analytics, retry rules, and suppression lists. SMS usage may require carrier registration. Best for customer success and operations alerts.

name: HelpDesk AI
supportNotes: Provides ticket triage, suggested replies, sentiment detection, and escalation routing. Requires knowledge base sync during onboarding. Enterprise customers can enable custom intent models.

name: PeopleOps Portal
supportNotes: Supports PTO requests, onboarding checklists, employee document collection, and manager approvals. Integrates with Okta, Workday, and Google Workspace. Recommended for HR teams with recurring employee lifecycle workflows.

name: FinanceGuard
supportNotes: Flags unusual spend patterns, policy exceptions, duplicate invoices, and approval bypasses. Requires finance admin approval for production rollout. Includes quarterly compliance review.

name: LaunchPad CRM
supportNotes: Includes lead scoring, pipeline management, email sequence automation, and revenue forecasting. Connects with Gmail, Outlook, HubSpot, and Salesforce. Migration assistance is available for Pro and Enterprise customers.

name: FieldTrack Mobile
supportNotes: Designed for field teams that need offline forms, route notes, GPS check-ins, and photo uploads. Data sync resumes automatically when connectivity returns. Device management policies are recommended for rollout.

name: LearnLoop LMS
supportNotes: Supports course assignments, progress tracking, quizzes, completion certificates, and SCORM packages. Useful for employee training, compliance courses, and customer education programs.
